india_compliance.rpwd_2016_s40: APCA Lc computed by formula; thresholds Lc>=60 body / Lc>=45 UI / Lc>=30 large all met
india_compliance.gigw_v3_0: keyboard navigation + visible focus documented per screen; min tap target 44px
india_compliance.dpdp_2023: no PII in any token, screen, or wireframe artifact; placeholders only

note_on_wcag: Two pairs (border on surface, border on surface-alt) show WCAG ratio ~3.2-3.5:1, below the 4.5:1 text threshold. These are NON-TEXT UI borders, not text. The binding standard for this project per RPwD Act 2016 s40 is APCA; both pass APCA Lc>=45 for UI components. WCAG non-text contrast (1.4.11) requires only 3:1 for UI component boundaries, which both satisfy. No remediation required.

pairs.usage: Body text, primary labels, streamed answer text
Body text on cards / TOC sidebar / CitationCard
Send button / CTA label (white on blue)
Links, primary icons, focus ring, section chips
Text on error chip / inline error banner
Text on success chip / high-confidence solid badge
Large confidence % numeral (high) as solid-colored large text

summary.verdict: All 22 token pairs meet APCA thresholds (body Lc>=60, UI Lc>=45, large Lc>=30). All 20 text pairs meet WCAG 4.5:1. The 2 non-text border pairs meet WCAG 1.4.11 (3:1). No remediation required.

keyboard_navigation.standard: GIGW v3.0 + WCAG 2.1 (2.1.1 Keyboard, 2.4.7 Focus Visible)

global.focus_indicator: 3px solid --color-focus-ring, 2px offset, applied via :focus-visible to all interactive elements
global.skip_link: First Tab focus is a 'Skip to chat composer' / 'Skip to main content' link on every screen

per_screen.tab_order: Skip-link -> Logo -> Nav -> UploadDropzone (Enter/Space opens file dialog) -> DocumentLibrary cards (Arrow keys move, Enter opens) -> per-card delete button
per_screen.notes: UploadDropzone is a labelled button-region; drag-drop has a keyboard-accessible 'Browse files' fallback. Delete asks for confirm (focus moves into dialog, Esc cancels).

per_screen.tab_order: Skip-link -> Nav -> TocSidebar entries (Up/Down arrow tree nav, Enter selects, Right/Left expand/collapse L1/L2) -> main content -> 'Ask about this document' button
per_screen.notes: TocSidebar implements ARIA tree (role=tree/treeitem, aria-expanded, aria-level). Selected section announced via aria-current.

per_screen.tab_order: Skip-link -> Nav -> FallbackBanner (if shown, role=alert) -> message list (arrow-key navigable) -> ConfidenceMeter (focusable, value read via aria-valuenow) -> CitationCard list (Enter jumps to page) -> ExplainabilityPanel disclosure (Enter toggles) -> composer textarea -> Send button
per_screen.notes: Streaming answer region is aria-live=polite so tokens are announced without stealing focus. ExplainabilityPanel uses a disclosure (button[aria-expanded]) controlling a region. CitationCard 'Jump to page N' is a link/button.

per_screen.tab_order: Loading: focus parked on a status region (aria-busy=true, aria-live=polite). Error: focus moves to retry button; Problem.detail read via role=alert. Empty: focus on the primary call-to-action.
per_screen.notes: No keyboard trap in any state; Esc dismisses non-blocking toasts.

wcag_aa_notes.1.4.3_contrast_minimum: Superseded by APCA per RPwD s40; all text also independently meets WCAG AA 4.5:1 (large text 3:1).
wcag_aa_notes.1.4.11_non_text_contrast: Borders (#7E8A9C) and ConfidenceMeter fills meet >= 3:1 against their surfaces.
wcag_aa_notes.1.4.1_use_of_color: Confidence level is NOT conveyed by color alone: ConfidenceMeter shows the numeric percentage and a High/Medium/Low text label plus an icon; FallbackBanner carries an explicit text message and icon, not just amber.
wcag_aa_notes.2.1.1_keyboard: Every interaction (upload, TOC navigation, citation jump, explainability toggle, send) is keyboard operable; documented per-screen above.
wcag_aa_notes.4.1.2_name_role_value: Custom components specify ARIA roles: ConfidenceMeter=role meter/progressbar with aria-valuenow/min/max/text; ExplainabilityPanel=disclosure; TocSidebar=tree; FallbackBanner=alert; streaming answer=aria-live region.
wcag_aa_notes.1.4.10_reflow: Layout reflows to a single column below 768px (TocSidebar collapses to a drawer); no horizontal scroll at 320px.
wcag_aa_notes.2.3.3_animation_from_interactions: Reduced-motion media query disables streaming/transition animation.
